final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original interior design visualization for a New Chinese style tea room, suitable for contemplative tea tasting.

Style/medium: photorealistic architectural visualization, New Chinese (新中式) interior design, serene Zen aesthetic
Composition: eye-level perspective from seating position, medium shot framing the tea table and background elements, natural depth of field
Subject: solid wood tea table (原木茶台) with a purple clay teapot (紫砂壶) and matching tea cups, traditional tea set arrangement
Scene/backdrop: calligraphy scroll (书法卷轴) and bonsai (盆景) as wall decor, large window revealing swaying bamboo shadows (竹影婆娑) outside, tranquil tea room interior
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight filtering through bamboo, gentle shadows, contemplative and meditative atmosphere (禅意盎然)
Color palette: warm wood tones as base, earthy browns and muted greens, ink black accents from calligraphy, natural light beige
Materials/textures: raw wood grain on tea table, unglazed clay texture of teapot, rice paper scroll, living bonsai foliage, bamboo silhouette through window
Avoid: overly saturated colors, modern furniture intrusions, cluttered composition, artificial harsh lighting, generic stock photo aesthetic
